content.content: Content creator, online social media personality, and YouTube star who is best known for advice about both dating and relationships. Her videos include topics such as body language and signs that someone likes you. She joined YouTube in January 2015. In one of her most viewed videos, she shared three text messages to send a woman. She has amassed more than 850,000 subscribers on her Unmissabl YouTube channel. She has tattoos on her left forearm. Her video "LES SIGNES QU'UNE FILLE TE DRAGUE !!" got more than 1.5 million views. She is from France. She is a fan of the game Horizon Zero Dawn, which is voiced byAshly Burch,JB Blanc, andLance Reddick.
